creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.  I apologise for the slow processing.  Here are some issues for you to check:

 - please use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION if possible
 - USE_GITLAB has recently changes and no longer requires a commit hash to
   be given.  Please check the CHANGES file, entry of 20230712 for details
 - check if the build dependency on bash can be eliminated by running scripts
   with ${SH} instead of bash

The rest of the port looks good.  It can likely be committed once these issues are addressed.

Please also ensure to set the "maintainer-approved" flag to "+" on patches to ports you maintain as well as new ports you submit.  This speeds up processing.
